instruction: Write a polite response to a customer whose delivery is one day late.
input: The parcel will arrive tomorrow because the dispatch rider had a breakdown.
output: Hello, and thank you for your patience. We apologise that your parcel is arriving a day late. Our dispatch rider had an unexpected breakdown, but your delivery is now scheduled for tomorrow. We will keep you updated until it arrives.

instruction: Reply professionally to a customer asking for a discount.
input: The listed price is ₦18,000 and the lowest approved price is ₦17,000.
output: Thank you for your interest. The listed price is ₦18,000, but we can offer you our best approved price of ₦17,000. Please let us know if you would like us to reserve the item for you.

instruction: Write a calm response to a customer who received the wrong colour.
input: They ordered blue but received black. The shop can exchange it at no delivery charge.
output: We are sorry that you received the wrong colour. You ordered blue, and we will arrange an exchange at no delivery charge. Please send your order number and a photo of the item so we can resolve this promptly.

instruction: Tell a customer that payment has not yet reflected without accusing them.
input: The customer says they transferred the money ten minutes ago.
output: Thank you for the update. The payment has not reflected on our account yet, but bank transfers can sometimes take a little time. Kindly send the transaction receipt while we continue to check, and we will confirm as soon as it reflects.

instruction: Write a short follow-up after sending a quotation.
input: The quotation was sent two days ago for catering services.
output: Good afternoon. I am following up on the catering quotation we sent two days ago. Please let us know if you have any questions or would like us to adjust the package to suit your event.

instruction: Explain the term cash flow to a new small-business owner.
input: Use a simple example involving a food vendor.
output: Cash flow is the money entering and leaving a business over time. For a food vendor, customer payments are cash coming in, while ingredients, transport, rent, and wages are cash going out. A profitable business can still struggle if money goes out before customer payments come in.

instruction: Explain what an invoice is and how it differs from a receipt.
output: An invoice is a request for payment that lists the goods or services supplied, prices, and payment terms. A receipt confirms that payment has already been made. In simple terms, an invoice says what is owed; a receipt shows what was paid.

instruction: Explain the meaning of wholesale price.
output: A wholesale price is the price charged when goods are sold in larger quantities, usually to another business that plans to resell them. It is often lower per item than the retail price, but the buyer may need to meet a minimum order quantity.

instruction: Explain profit margin in plain language.
input: A trader buys an item for ₦8,000 and sells it for ₦10,000. Ignore other costs for this simple example.
output: Profit margin shows how much of a sale remains as profit. In this simplified example, the profit is ₦2,000. The profit margin is ₦2,000 divided by the ₦10,000 selling price, which is 20%. Real calculations should also include expenses such as delivery, packaging, rent, and fees.

instruction: Explain what payment terms of 50% upfront and 50% on delivery mean.
output: These payment terms mean the customer pays half of the agreed price before work or delivery begins, then pays the remaining half when the order is delivered. The business should state what happens if the order changes or is cancelled.

instruction: Write a polite Pidgin reply for customer wey dey ask why order never reach.
input: Rider go deliver am tomorrow morning.
output: Good afternoon. We sorry say your order never reach as planned. Our rider don arrange to deliver am tomorrow morning. We go update you until you receive am. Thank you for your patience.

instruction: Tell customer for Pidgin say the item don finish but new stock dey come.
input: New stock go arrive next week.
output: Thank you for your interest. The item don finish for now, but new stock go arrive next week. If you want, we fit collect your contact and message you immediately e land.

instruction: Write respectful Pidgin response to customer wey complain say product damage.
input: Ask for order number and clear picture.
output: We sorry say the product reach you with damage. Abeg send your order number and clear picture of the product make we check am quickly and arrange the correct solution for you.

instruction: Explain cash flow for simple Nigerian Pidgin.
output: Cash flow na how money dey enter and comot from your business. Customer payment na money wey enter, while stock, transport, rent, and salary na money wey comot. You need plan both sides so money no go finish before the next payment enter.

instruction: Explain invoice and receipt difference for Pidgin.
output: Invoice na document wey show wetin customer suppose pay for goods or service. Receipt na proof say the customer don pay. Invoice dey request payment; receipt dey confirm payment.

instruction: Translate this customer message into Nigerian Pidgin.
input: Your order is ready for collection. Please bring your payment receipt.
output: Your order don ready for collection. Abeg bring your payment receipt when you dey come.

instruction: Translate this message into professional Nigerian English.
input: We never see your payment for our side. Abeg send the receipt make we check am.
output: We have not yet received confirmation of your payment. Please send the payment receipt so that we can check the transaction.

instruction: Translate this customer update into Nigerian Pidgin.
input: We have received your complaint and will respond before the close of business today.
output: We don receive your complaint, and we go reply you before business close today.

instruction: Translate this message into professional Nigerian English.
input: The size wey you choose don finish, but we fit change am to medium if you agree.
output: The size you selected is currently out of stock, but we can change your order to a medium if that works for you.

instruction: Translate this payment reminder into Nigerian Pidgin without sounding harsh.
input: This is a friendly reminder that your balance is due tomorrow.
output: This one na friendly reminder say the remaining balance suppose ready tomorrow. Thank you.
